name: @darna-digital/composable-fetcher
description: Builder-based HTTP fetcher with Standard Schema validation, typed error decoding, composable error handling with retry, and observability.

scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
scripts.release: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run build && cp ../../README.md . && pnpm publish --access public && rm README.md
scripts.release:dry: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run build && cp ../../README.md . && pnpm publish --access public --dry-run && rm README.md
scripts.release:patch: pnpm version patch && pnpm run release
scripts.release:minor: pnpm version minor && pnpm run release
scripts.release:major: pnpm version major && pnpm run release

author: Darna Digital
